name: Aebi Schmidt Holding AG
business: Aebi Schmidt Holding AG is a global manufacturer of specialty vehicles, offering solutions for snow removal, de-icing, street and runway sweepers, truck and RV chassis, truck bodies, and vehicle upfitting for commercial fleets. It also produces specialty vehicles for municipal, airport, and agricultural maintenance. The company operates in 17 countries through its own sales and service organizations and via dealers in over 90 countries.

exposures.sentence: Agriculture: Aebi provides solutions that enable safe, efficient cultivation of steep or challenging terrain.
Since 2022, Blue Arc, our first all-electric brand, complemented the portfolio.
Almost all are equipped with advanced control systems, some of which allow automated or autonomous operations.

catalysts.sentence: For the year ending December 31, 2026, Aebi Schmidt anticipates approximately $24 million of capital expenditures to maintain the capacity of its manufacturing facilities and invest in emerging technologies.
